vin.title: Vehicle identification (VIN)
vin.description:
Enter the **VIN** (17 characters) of the vehicle.

You can find the VIN on the same CarData page as the Client ID and GCID, in the **CarData streaming** section.

If you have already added a vehicle, the Client ID and GCID are the same for all vehicles—only the VIN differs. You can skip the next steps and use your existing credentials.

data.skip_credentials: Use existing credentials (skip Client ID and GCID)

data_description.vin: The vehicle identification number, 17 alphanumeric characters
data_description.skip_credentials: Use credentials from an already configured BMW CarData integration

credentials.title: BMW CarData credentials
credentials.description:
Enter your BMW CarData **Client ID** and **GCID** from the MyBMW app / website.

**Where to find them:**
- Go to **My BMW** → **Personal Data** → **My Vehicles** → **CarData**
- **Client ID:** Create or copy from "Create Client ID" (GUID format)
- **GCID:** In **CARDATA STREAM** → "Show Connection Details" → copy the **USERNAME** value. The **VIN** is in the same section.

data_description.client_id: The Client ID from MyBMW CarData (e.g. xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)
data_description.gcid: The GCID / username from CarData stream connection details

device_flow.title: Complete BMW login

init.title: Reauthenticate BMW CarData
init.description: Reauthenticate your BMW account to refresh the connection. Click **Continue** to open a verification link in the next step.

reauth_verify.title: Verify your BMW login

reauth_success.title: Reauthentication successful
reauth_success.description: Your BMW CarData connection has been updated. You can close this dialog.

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid Client ID or GCID. Check the format (GUID for Client ID).
error.invalid_vin: VIN must be exactly 17 alphanumeric characters.
error.no_existing_credentials: No existing BMW CarData integration with valid Client ID and GCID found. Please enter credentials in the next step.
error.device_flow_failed: Could not get tokens. Make sure you completed login in the browser and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to BMW CarData. Check your credentials and try again.

abort.already_configured: This BMW CarData account is already configured.
